variants.title: Filtrec RHK201M15B Return Filter
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec RHK201M15B. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the RHK201M15B provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
specifications: Style: Return Filter, Media: Synthetic, Efficiency 1: 17µ @ β200, Efficiency 2: 20µ @ β1000, Outer Diameter: 88.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 40.2 mm, Length: 328.0 mm, Δ Collapse Pressure: 10 bar, Seal Material: Nitrile, Temperature Range: -30 - +100°C, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 17µ @ β200, Media Type: Synthetic, Flow Direction: OUT-IN, Collapse Pressure: 10 BAR, Seal: Nitrile

variants.title: Donaldson P958246 Hydraulic Filter, Cartridge | Replaces the Filtrec RHK201M15B
variants.option1Value: Donaldson P958246 Hydraulic Filter, Cartridge | Replaces the Filtrec RHK201M15B
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P958246 Hydraulic Filter, Cartridge is designed to provide superior protection for your hydraulic system, effectively capturing contaminants to ensure clean fluid circulation. With high-quality filtration media, it extends equipment life, improves operational efficiency, and maintains fluid cleanliness even in the most demanding environments. Built for industrial, agricultural, and heavy-duty applications, this filter offers excellent dirt-holding capacity and flow efficiency. Its easy installation and maintenance help reduce downtime, making it a reliable choice for keeping hydraulic systems running smoothly.

variants.title: Hydac 0201 RK 015 MM Return Filter | Replaces the Filtrec RHK201M15B
variants.option1Value: Hydac 0201 RK 015 MM Return Filter | Replaces the Filtrec RHK201M15B
variants.description: Genuine Hydac 0201 RK 015 MM Return Filter. Built to HYDAC’s OEM specifications and quality standards, this genuine part offers reliable performance, long service life and a precise fit. It’s suitable for a wide range of hydraulic and process applications, helping protect equipment, reduce downtime and maintain system cleanliness. For best results, match the part code to your equipment manual and verify key dimensions and ratings (size, connection, filtration grade/flow) before installation.
